name: Picpurify
description: Picpurify — image and video moderation API for nudity, violence, drugs, and face detection.

seo.title: Picpurify — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Picpurify: Picpurify — image and video moderation API for nudity, violence, drugs, and face detection.

when_to_use: Moderating user-uploaded images for nudity, violence, and drugs
Running NSFW image classification on marketplace listings
Building real-time visual content safety for social apps
Filtering inappropriate content from public user galleries

pros: Focused set of visual moderation categories
Reasonable pricing for image and video
Face and age detection useful for dating apps
cons: Accuracy on edge cases trails top vendors
review.verdict: Workable budget visual moderation API with useful face/age checks; not the strongest on hard NSFW cases.
review.best_for: Dating, classifieds, and UGC apps needing affordable image and video screening with face signals.
review.not_for: Platforms with high-volume CSAM risk or strict regulatory compliance needs.
